meanings.definition: turn red, as if in embarrassment or shame
examples: The girl blushed when a young man whistled as she walked by
The garbage flushed down the river

meanings.definition: glow or cause to glow with warm color or light
examples: the sky flushed with rosy splendor

meanings.definition: rinse, clean, or empty with a liquid
irrigate with water from a sluice
cause to flow or flood with or as if with water
having the pinkish flush of health
(especially of the face) reddened or suffused with or as if with blood from emotion or exertion
